name: Sam, Barry
description: Quiet and dignified; a good student. Believes in doing right because it is right. Yell County will be proud of him.

name: Lou, Burgess
description: A Pope County girl loyal to the Agricultural School. She has always been a good student, also likes to work in the garden. Has intention of pursuing the study of domestic economy in some higher institution. Her favorite study is domestic art.

name: George, Dodd
description: A natural born business man as shown by the way he conducted the affairs of the senior class. He wants a higher education in Agriculture. He is a native of Pope County.

name: Falls, Grover
description: Can say more on physics than any one in the class. Is very fond of "pulling the line over old Beck's back." Farm management is his hobby. Will some day be Pope county's leading farmer.

name: Shenn, Gladys
description: What is a class without a musician? She has intentions of going on the platform in the interest of woman suffrage. She can play, paint and sing. She is an earnest worker in every thing that pertains to the improvement of school life.

name: Oates, Bonner
motto: "what is worth doing is worth doing well."
description: He will make a great agriculturist. His nose is sharper than his wit.

name: Rollow, Carden
motto: "I'll some day cast off my girlish pranks and be a man."
description: He was raised in town but loves farm life. Horticulture is his favorite study.

name: Stroup, Zeta
description: She will some day go to Europe to study Domestic Science. She has a lovable disposition. She would rather be versed in domestic economy than stenography. Giggles at everything funny.

name: Shibley, Clyde
description: He may make a preacher or a lawyer. He has always been a studious boy. Was born on a farm in Crawford county.

name: Delaney, Will
description: Very studious. He is interested in domestic art. By the wise look he wears he has been able to butt in among the instructors. A native of Sebastian County.

name: Brown, Salemma
description: She can sing, paint a flower, make a dress or cook a meal. She is fond of working in the garden.
